opportunities.title: Founder Residence
opportunities.description:
Job description:

This is a six-week residency programme, not salaried employment. Read on for what it actually offers.


About Saff

Saff is a six-week residency for Muslim founders who have already shipped. You move into one house in London with nine other founders, build a go-to-market system around your company, and close with a demo day where half the room are buyers.


What you walk out with

  • A mapped list of your hundred target accounts and thirty dream buyers, built in week

opportunities.description:
What is Anori Tech doing?

The world talks about batteries, cells and the energy transition. Almost nobody talks about the Battery Management System (BMS) that makes them work.

As battery applications multiply, from robotics and mobility to data centers and grid-scale storage, BMS complexity is exploding. Legacy BMS architectures were never built for this: too rigid to keep up with new requirements, they've turned the BMS into the bottleneck of battery development.
